task: Move the black spectacle case to the left side of the desk
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A black spectacle case lies on a desk, next to a white keyboard and a white mug. The case is a rigid, rectangular object with a smooth surface. The desk surface is dark. STRATEGY - First, reach for the spectacle case to grasp it. Then, transport it to the left side of the desk. Failure modes include dropping the case during transport or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for the case to establish contact. Step 2: Grasp the case for secure hold. Step 3: Transport the case to the left side of the desk. Step 4: Place the case on the left side of the desk.

Goal: on(spectacle_case, desk) AND position(spectacle_case, left_side_of(desk))
Scene: spectacle_case, desk, keyboard, mug
Step 1: reach(spectacle_case)
  affordance_region: the body of the black spectacle case
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, spectacle_case, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, spectacle_case) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(spectacle_case)
  affordance_region: the body of the black spectacle case
  contact: holding(spectacle_case) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(spectacle_case)
Step 3: transport(spectacle_case -> left_side_of(desk))
  affordance_region: an empty area on the left side of the desk
  spatial: above(spectacle_case, left_side_of(desk), 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(spectacle_case)
  done_when: above(spectacle_case, left_side_of(desk), 0.05)
Step 4: place(spectacle_case -> left_side_of(desk))
  affordance_region: an empty area on the left side of the desk
  contact: surface_contact(spectacle_case, desk) [completion]; released(spectacle_case) [completion]
  pose: stable(spectacle_case) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(spectacle_case, desk) AND released(spectacle_case)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the black spectacle case
the body of the black spectacle case
an empty area on the left side of the desk
an empty area on the left side of the desk
